title: Ores Armor Tools
description: this is my first mod that adds new ores, new armor and new tools!
body:
This mod have Amethyst armor, emerald armor, new ore - Leymand that makes you speeder. Platinum ore and Iridium mace.
Emerald and amethyst tools and armor have their upgrades! Iridium makes from netherite, iron and platunum. This project will improve in the future. This project makes mining better and interesting!
